scripts.dev: npm run clean && cross-env SITE_BUILD_TARGET=main node --max-old-space-size=12288 ./node_modules/@11ty/eleventy/cmd.cjs --serve
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:eleventy && npm run build:sitemap
scripts.build:varieties: npm run clean:varieties && cross-env SITE_BUILD_TARGET=varieties node --max-old-space-size=12288 ./node_modules/@11ty/eleventy/cmd.cjs --output=_site-varieties && npm run build:sitemap:varieties
scripts.dev:varieties: npm run clean:varieties && cross-env SITE_BUILD_TARGET=varieties node --max-old-space-size=12288 ./node_modules/@11ty/eleventy/cmd.cjs --serve --output=_site-varieties
